title: 10 OLT Reports
body_text:
10	OLT Reports
10.1	Overview of OLT Reports
Tracers and SuperTracers can generate OLT trace request reports. Reports can be generated in PDF or CSV format. The OLT reports are used for various purposes including:
Daily reconciliation of settled trace requests
â You can request a report on trace requests with the status âClosed â Settledâ for the previous business day. The report provides the adjustment amount, the service charge amount, and the transit number to which settlement is posted. Review all comments on the trace request before settling with the member.
Identification of outstanding trace requests
â You can request a report on trace requests with the âOpenâ status.
Identification of unauthorized trace requests
â You can request a report on trace requests with the âWaiting for Approvalâ status.
Statistical purposes
â You can request a report on all status types within a specified period to determine how many trace requests were processed during that period.
10.2	Generating an OLT Report
A Tracer or SuperTracer proceeds as follows to generate an OLT trace request report:
Log in to OLT, as described in Section 6.2, Logging in to OLT.
Select
Reports
. See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Accessing OLT Reports
Select
Create your own Report
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Create Report
Enter the search criteria and the desired report type. The start and end date fields are mandatory. See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Enter Search Criteria
Select
Generate
.
Review the report and, if required, print or save the report using your internet browserâs print or save function. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Sample Report
END
